summary: EXP-224 written. Two-anchor patch to SEC-8b.3 L3a paragraph in data/sections.json (part8b.html): (1) rename sub-paragraph header "Fail-clause tension" → "Fail-clause double-bind"; (2) replace the single-sentence Fail-clause-tension argument with a four-sentence forced-disjunction (double-bind) argument. Each anchor verified as unique (1 occurrence each) in the current workspace file; dry-run applied in memory and round-trip JSON.parse succeeds. Adopts c4 hole #1 recommendation option (a): explicitly name interpretation A (baseline-Sq null test — no tension with Pass, but concedes no dome-specific forecast) and interpretation B (eclipse-modulated Chapman Sq-dynamo — Pass and Fail become mutually exclusive), and show the Pass band fails to distinguish dome from globe on either branch. Strengthens a rebuttable single-horn tension claim into a forced disjunction that forecloses both escape routes. TLDR change not required (Fail-clause not referenced in 8b.3 TLDR). No cross-section propagation required (Fail-clause framing is local to SEC-8b.3; WIN-068 and PRED-095 contain zero matches for "Fail-clause").
